items.title: Statistical Inference (Casella & Berger)
items.author: George Casella, Roger L. Berger
items.note: Standard graduate treatment of MLE, properties, and comparison with other estimators.

items.title: All of Statistics (Wasserman)
items.author: Larry Wasserman
items.note: Concise MLE derivations for common parametric models with optimization viewpoint.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Connects maximum likelihood, cross-entropy, and gradient-based learning in Chapters 5 and 8.

items.title: On the mathematical foundations of theoretical statistics (Fisher, 1922)
items.author: R. A. Fisher
items.note: Foundational paper formalizing maximum likelihood and Fisher information.
